seoTitle: Mount Marsh vs Mount Murray — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Marsh and Mount Murray. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Marsh vs Mount Murray: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Marsh and Mount Murray.
heading: Mount Marsh vs Mount Murray — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Marsh, New South Wales and Mount Murray, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Mount Murray (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Marsh or Mount Murray safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Marsh has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Mount Murray scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Marsh scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Murray scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Marsh or Mount Murray?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Marsh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
